title: Missing 28 directories from build plan
description: Directories expected by build plan are missing: src/api, src/components/features/endless_survival_gameplay_with_increasing_enemy_difficulty, src/components/features/pointbased_upgrade_system_for_fighter_abilities_and_attributes, src/components/features/dynamic_urban_environments_with_interactive_elements, src/components/features/leaderboard_to_compare_scores_with_other_players_globally, src/components/features/customizable_fighters_with_unique_skins_or_abilities, src/components/features/achievement_system_for_unlockable_rewards, src/components/features/ingame_tutorials_and_guidance_for_new_players, src/components/features/offline_mode_with_local_score_tracking, tests/integration
probable_cause: Build process did not create all planned directory structures
remediation: Ensure all planned directories are created during the build process
